statement: In every magma, Equation 2768 (`x = ((y * y) * (z * w)) * w`) implies Equation 2308 (`x = (y * (x * (y * z))) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0945
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y y) (op z w)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x (op y z))) z)
